description_long: This is a compact, two-story convenience store with a tiled gable roof and a small residential area above. The ground floor features a green and white striped awning, a main entrance door, and a storefront window, with potted plants and a mailbox adding detail to the sidewalk. The upper floor has a balcony with a wooden railing, a side staircase, and a small window, suggesting a living space above the shop. Utility poles with overhead wires are positioned at the building's corners, and a cat is perched on the roof, adding a touch of character. The rear of the building includes a service area with a dumpster and a fire hydrant, while the side features an external staircase and air conditioning unit. The overall design is colorful and stylized, with a blend of urban and residential elements typical of small neighborhood convenience stores.
description: A two-story, stylized convenience store with a green and white awning, residential balcony above, utility poles, and detailed street elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, green and white awning, storefront window, potted plants, and mailbox.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the building's signage, a large window, and a cat figure on the roof, with visible utility pole and wires.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the balcony, service door, dumpster, fire hydrant, and utility infrastructure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring the external staircase, air conditioning unit, and additional access to the upper floor.
attribute_storefront_signage: A rectangular, wall-mounted sign with a green background and a white icon, positioned above the side window; a green and white striped awning above the main entrance; no illuminated or text signage visible.
attribute_display_windows: One medium-sized display window next to the main entrance, framed in wood, transparent, with no visible advertisements.
